overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a slow walk through a foggy, dystopian urban street at night. The player moves past a burning car and navigates toward a massive stadium structure, with neon lights and fires illuminating the rain-soaked, reflective asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: dystopian urban street with burning vehicle

events.description: pedestrian runs across the street from right to left in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the foggy street toward the burning vehicle ahead

notable_agents.action: running across the street from right to left

entered.detail: wrecked vehicle engulfed in flames emitting thick smoke
tall industrial concrete structures with lit windows
weathered concrete buildings with neon signage
dense network of electrical wires crisscrossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy night street with a burning car on the right side. The player walks forward through the industrial urban environment, passing under overhead power lines. At around 12 seconds, an NPC runs across the street from right to left. The concrete buildings on both sides feature neon signs and lit windows, creating a dystopian atmosphere.

events.description: passing the burning car, which moves out of view to the rear

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street as the massive stadium structure becomes visible in the distance

entered.detail: massive curved stadium wall with 'STADIUM' text visible in the distance
piles of garbage and debris stacked along the sidewalk
concrete barriers and metal fencing blocking off areas

segments.scene_description: Having passed the burning vehicle, the player moves through a more open section of the street. The massive stadium structure becomes visible in the far distance, dominating the skyline. Trash piles and concrete barricades line the right side of the road, while overhead power lines continue to stretch across the foggy sky.

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved wall of the stadium, navigating past parked vehicles and debris

entered.detail: massive concrete stadium wall with weathered surface and large painted text
abandoned vehicles parked along the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: The street narrows as the player walks alongside the massive curved wall of the stadium. Parked cars line the left side while debris piles occupy the right. The foggy atmosphere persists, with artificial lighting from street lamps creating pools of light on the wet asphalt. The stadium wall dominates the right side of the frame as the player progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza approaching tower and large fire

events.description: approaching large fire creates intense orange illumination reflecting off wet ground

agents.ego_description: approaching the final area with the tall tower and large bonfire, navigating around parked vehicles

entered.detail: tall industrial tower with red warning lights at the top
large bonfire or burning structure providing bright orange illumination
rain-soaked asphalt creating mirror-like reflections of fires and lights

segments.scene_description: The environment opens up into a wider plaza area. The player approaches a tall industrial tower with red aviation lights and a large fire burning brightly ahead. The wet ground creates dramatic reflections of the orange firelight and neon signs. The stadium structure has fallen behind, and the scene is dominated by the tower and the approaching inferno.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a claustrophobic, foggy urban street that gradually opens up to reveal a massive architectural landmark. It begins by passing a burning car on the right, moving forward through an industrial environment under a web of overhead power lines. As the camera advances, an NPC darts across the street from right to left, framed by the neon signs and lit windows of surrounding concrete buildings. The scene then expands into a more open stretch of road, where the perspective shifts from the immediate chaos of trash piles and concrete barricades toward the horizon. Finally, the view opens fully to reveal a colossal stadium structure dominating the distant, foggy skyline.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic urban corridor into a wide, fire-lit industrial plaza. It begins with the camera navigating a narrowing street, flanked by parked cars and debris while the massive, curved wall of a stadium looms over the right side of the frame. As the player progresses through the persistent fog, the artificial glow of street lamps casts pools of light across the wet asphalt. The scene then opens up as the stadium wall recedes, shifting the focus toward a towering industrial structure marked by red aviation lights. Finally, the camera advances toward a large, brightly burning fire, with the orange inferno and neon signs creating dramatic reflections on the rain-soaked ground.
